methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Space & Aerospace (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 23 same-sector peers exist in Space & Aerospace, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Space & Aerospace P/S median is 59.8x across 6 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

data.narrative:
Beyond Reach is a pre-seed stage Space & Aerospace company founded by Mitchell Fogelson and Pele Collins. The valuation universe comprises 5 public comparables (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private peers including SpaceX, Rocket Lab, Blue Origin, Planet Labs, and Firefly Aerospace—a total of 13 reference points across the sector.

Two standard triangulation methods proved inapplicable to this valuation. Peer-median analysis failed because the narrow filters for same-stage, adjacent-stage, and similar-tier peers within Space & Aerospace yielded fewer than 3 datapoints; while 23 same-sector peers exist, none satisfied the proximity criteria required for reliable median extraction. Public-comp anchoring could not proceed because Beyond Reach's revenue is not on file, which is typical for private companies at this stage. The public Space & Aerospace sector median P/S stands at 59.8x across the 6-ticker reference set, but without target revenue this multiple cannot be applied.

Without completed quantitative methods, a valuation range cannot be derived from this dataset. The analysis identifies material uncertainty: pre-seed stage position and undisclosed financial metrics preclude standard comparable-based approaches. Future valuation work would require either disclosed revenue, comparable transaction data from the private peer set, or alternative methodologies (e.g., discounted cash flow or venture capital method inputs).
